name: ASIAFIN HOLDINGS CORP.
business: The company, through its wholly owned subsidiaries, offers system solutions in Payment Processing, Robotic Process Automation (RPA), and Regulatory Technology (RegTech) to financial institutions, regulatory agencies, professional service providers, and private enterprises, primarily in Asia and Saudi Arabia.

exposures.sentence: We have our own web-based payment processing system for check clearing used in central banks, financial institutions and payment system providers.
We have our own Artificial Intelligence-based (or AI-based) RPA software solutions for financial institutions, large corporations and small medium enterprises.

We have a RegTech system which conforms to XBRL reporting standards and other compliance reporting required by regulatory agencies such as central banks, securities commissions, tax authorities and company registries.

tamClaims.claim: The total transaction value in the Digital Payments market is projected to reach US$26.89 trillion in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: In the global market, the total transaction value in the Digital Payments market is projected to reach US$26.89 trillion in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The global RPA market size was estimated at US$4.68 billion in 2025 and is projected to grow to US$35.84 billion by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The global RPA market size was estimated at US$4.68 billion in 2025 and is projected to grow to US$35.84 billion by 2033, exhibiting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 29.0% during the forecast period (2026 - 2033).

tamClaims.claim: The global RegTech market size was valued at US$18.60 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach US$77.00 billion by 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: The global RegTech market size was valued at US$18.60 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach US$77.00 billion by 2034 to grow at a CAGR of 17.1% during the forecast periods from 2026 to 2034.

tamClaims.claim: The Asia-Pacific RPA market is projected to expand from US$1.21 billion in 2025 to US$1.61 billion in 2026, and is expected to grow further to US$6.83 billion by 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: The Asia-Pacific RPA market is projected to expand from US$1.21 billion in 2025 to US$1.61 billion in 2026, and is expected to grow further to US$6.83 billion by 2031, registering a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 33.5% from 2026 to 2031.
